subject: Circuit CIRC-44781 down since 09:14
description: Our monitoring shows circuit CIRC-44781 is unreachable from 09:14 CET. Customers in Brussels-Centre are affected. Please investigate urgently.

subject: Reschedule field appointment APT-20460
description: Could you move the field engineer appointment APT-20460 from Tuesday afternoon to Thursday morning? Our site contact is unavailable on Tuesday.

subject: Invoice INV-2026-0412 looks wrong
description: April invoice INV-2026-0412 shows EUR 1,240 for circuit CIRC-66302 but the contract rate is EUR 980. Please review.

subject: Need new circuit provisioned in Ghent
description: We need a new 1Gbps circuit provisioned at Korenmarkt 12, 9000 Ghent. Target go-live mid-June. Please advise on the timeline.

subject: Slow throughput on CIRC-44782
description: Throughput on CIRC-44782 has been degraded since this morning. We are seeing approximately 2% packet loss between 08:00 and 11:00. Please investigate.

subject: Outage on CIRC-55120 — multiple customers down
description: Circuit CIRC-55120 is unreachable since 14:42. Approximately 180 business customers in Antwerp-Noord are without service. Escalating to your NOC.

subject: Weekend degraded throughput — CIRC-66301
description: Customers reporting slow speeds on CIRC-66301 over the weekend. Latency spiked to 180ms and we are seeing packet loss between 22:00 Friday and 04:00 Sunday. Please run diagnostics.

subject: Move appointment APT-20815 to next week
description: Could the field engineer site visit at our Brussels-Schaerbeek location (planned for Wednesday) be rescheduled? Our facility manager is on leave and we need someone on site to admit the engineer.

subject: Late-fee charges on INV-2026-0327 and INV-2026-0398
description: Two invoices include late-fee charges (EUR 75 each) despite payment confirmation from our finance team. Payment reference is on IBAN BE68 5390 0754 7034 7034. Please review and credit if appropriate.

subject: 10Gbps upgrade for our Ghent NOC
description: We need to upgrade existing circuit CIRC-77410 from 1Gbps to 10Gbps to support new customer onboarding. Target go-live is end of Q3. What is the lead time and is there a new-line option if upgrade-in-place is slow?

subject: Intermittent packet loss on CIRC-55120
description: Customers complaining about slow video conferencing. Our probes show ~3% packet loss with latency drifting from 12ms to 95ms between 07:00 and 09:30 each morning. Started two days ago. Throughput otherwise within SLA.

subject: Circuit CIRC-44781 outage — second incident this week
description: CIRC-44781 down again as of 06:14 this morning. This is the second outage on this circuit in five days. Please prioritize and consider a root-cause review with our team.

subject: Sunday outage on CIRC-77410 — engineer on call
description: Circuit CIRC-77410 went down at 02:14 Sunday. Our on-call engineer Jan Peeters (jan.peeters@ghentcomms.example.be, +32 9 555 0440) is reachable for coordination. Customers in Ghent-Gentbrugge affected.

subject: Equipment installation appointment APT-20920
description: Field engineer visit needed to install new ONT equipment at our Antwerp-Centraal site. We will need property-management coordination — building access requires 48h notice. Could you book the appointment for week 21 or 22?

subject: Disputed contract rate — CIRC-66303
description: Invoice INV-2026-0501 charged EUR 1,420 for CIRC-66303, but our signed contract rate is EUR 1,150. Please review and reissue if applicable. Finance contact: facturatie@operator.example.be.

subject: Question about appointment process
description: Our operations team noticed an unusual smell in the small NOC closet at Brussels-Centre. Probably HVAC, but we want to know who to contact on your side if it turns out to be something circuit-related. Not raising as an outage yet — just want the right escalation path.

subject: Chronic flap on CIRC-77410 — last 24h
description: CIRC-77410 has flapped seven times in the last 24 hours, with each outage lasting 30-90 seconds. Customers in Ghent-Sint-Pieters are reporting dropped sessions. Throughput between flaps looks normal. Please investigate root cause.
